slides.title: One meal won't *undo* it
slides.body: Fat loss is about the weekly average.

slides.title: Watch the *weekend*
slides.body: The whole weekend derails people, not one meal.

slides.title: *Plan* the treat
slides.body: A planned meal beats a guilty binge.

slides.title: Never miss *twice*
slides.body: One off meal, then right back on track.

slides.title: Aim for *80/20*
slides.body: Eat well most of the time. Enjoy the rest.

slides.title: Enjoy it, *on track*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the weekly average that matters.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
